title: zinnia marylandica
intro: Zinnia marylandica, also known as Mexican zinnia or zinnia elegans, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, belonging to the daisy family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Zinnia marylandica include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and fight off infections. Zinnia marylandica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments to treat skin conditions and wounds.
